From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1973 live album by Houston Person

| The Real Thing | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| [Live album](/wiki/Album#Live "Album") by [Houston Person](/wiki/Houston_Person "Houston Person") | |
| Released | 1973 |
| Recorded | March 14–15, 1973 |
| Venue | Watt's Club Mozambique, Detroit, MI |
| [Genre](/wiki/Music_genre "Music genre") | [Jazz](/wiki/Jazz "Jazz") |
| Length | 78:56 |
| [Label](/wiki/Record_label "Record label") | [Eastbound](/wiki/Westbound_Records "Westbound Records") 2EB-9010 |
| [Producer](/wiki/Record_producer "Record producer") | [Bob Porter](/wiki/Bob_Porter_(record_producer) "Bob Porter (record producer)") |
| [Houston Person](/wiki/Houston_Person "Houston Person") chronology | |
| |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | | *[Island Episode](/w/index.php?title=Island_Episode&action=edit&redlink=1 "Island Episode (page does not exist)")* (1971/73) | ***The Real Thing*** (1973) | *[Houston Person ’75](/w/index.php?title=Houston_Person_%E2%80%9975&action=edit&redlink=1 "Houston Person ’75 (page does not exist)")* (1974) | | |

***The Real Thing*** is a live double LP album by saxophonist [Houston Person](/wiki/Houston_Person "Houston Person") which was recorded in Detroit in 1973 and released on the [Eastbound](/wiki/Westbound_Records "Westbound Records") label.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## Track listing

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Real_Thing_(Houston_Person_album)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Track listing")]

1. "[You Are the Sunshine of My Life](/wiki/You_Are_the_Sunshine_of_My_Life "You Are the Sunshine of My Life")" ([Stevie Wonder](/wiki/Stevie_Wonder "Stevie Wonder")) – 8:55
2. "[Since I Fell for You](/wiki/Since_I_Fell_for_You "Since I Fell for You")" ([Buddy Johnson](/wiki/Buddy_Johnson "Buddy Johnson")) – 6:23
3. "[Until It's Time for You to Go](/wiki/Until_It%27s_Time_for_You_to_Go "Until It's Time for You to Go")" ([Buffy Sainte-Marie](/wiki/Buffy_Sainte-Marie "Buffy Sainte-Marie")) – 4:10
4. "Pain" ([Ohio Players](/wiki/Ohio_Players "Ohio Players")) – 13:50
5. "[Angel Eyes](/wiki/Angel_Eyes_(1946_song) "Angel Eyes (1946 song)")" ([Matt Dennis](/wiki/Matt_Dennis "Matt Dennis"), Earl Brent) – 7:05
6. "Easy Walker" ([Billy Taylor](/wiki/Billy_Taylor "Billy Taylor")) – 8:30
7. "Kittitian Carnival" ([Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips")) – 7:15
8. "[Could It Be I'm Falling in Love](/wiki/Could_It_Be_I%27m_Falling_in_Love "Could It Be I'm Falling in Love")" (Melvin Steals, Mervin Steals) – 4:20
9. "[Where Is the Love](/wiki/Where_Is_the_Love_(Roberta_Flack_and_Donny_Hathaway_song) "Where Is the Love (Roberta Flack and Donny Hathaway song)")" ([Ralph MacDonald](/wiki/Ralph_MacDonald "Ralph MacDonald"), William Salter) – 4:00
10. "['Tain't Nobody's Bizness If I Do](/wiki/Ain%27t_Nobody%27s_Business "Ain't Nobody's Business")" ([Porter Grainger](/wiki/Porter_Grainger "Porter Grainger"), [Everett Robbins](/wiki/Everett_Robbins "Everett Robbins")) – 3:50
11. "Don't Go to Strangers" ([Redd Evans](/wiki/Redd_Evans "Redd Evans"), [Arthur Kent](/wiki/Arthur_Kent_(songwriter) "Arthur Kent (songwriter)"), [Dave Mann](/wiki/David_Mann_(songwriter) "David Mann (songwriter)")) – 3:50
12. "Crazy Legs" (Donald Austin, Woody Wilson) – 6:48

## Personnel

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Real_Thing_(Houston_Person_album)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Personnel")]

* [Houston Person](/wiki/Houston_Person "Houston Person") – [tenor saxophone](/wiki/Tenor_saxophone "Tenor saxophone")
* [Marcus Belgrave](/wiki/Marcus_Belgrave "Marcus Belgrave") (tracks 4, 7, 8 & 12), Donald Townes (track 7) – trumpet
* Eli Fountain − [alto saxophone](/wiki/Alto_saxophone "Alto saxophone") (track 7)
* [Wild Bill Moore](/wiki/Wild_Bill_Moore "Wild Bill Moore") − [tenor saxophone](/wiki/Tenor_saxophone "Tenor saxophone") (track 7)
* [Jack McDuff](/wiki/Jack_McDuff "Jack McDuff") (track 5), Jim Watson (tracks 1, 2, 10 & 11), [Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips") (tracks 3, 4, 6–8 & 12) − [organ](/wiki/Electronic_organ "Electronic organ")
* [Grant Green](/wiki/Grant_Green "Grant Green") (tracks 2, 4–6, 8 & 12), Robert Lowe Jr. (tracks 1, 3, 4 & 7–12) − guitar
* [James Jamerson](/wiki/James_Jamerson "James Jamerson") – bass (tracks 4, 8 & 12)
* Hank Brown (tracks 1–3, 7, 9, 10 & 12), [Idris Muhammad](/wiki/Idris_Muhammad "Idris Muhammad") (tracks 4–6, 8 & 12) −drums
* Buddy Caldwell − [congas](/wiki/Congas "Congas"), [tambourine](/wiki/Tambourine "Tambourine") (tracks 1, 4 & 7–11)
* [Etta Jones](/wiki/Etta_Jones "Etta Jones") (tracks 10 & 11), [Spanky Wilson](/wiki/Spanky_Wilson "Spanky Wilson") (track 3) − vocals
